name: Solid Banking-as-a-Service API
what_it_does: Banking-as-a-Service (BaaS) platform with REST API — providing embedded banking infrastructure (FDIC-insured accounts, debit cards, ACH, wire transfers, rewards) for fintech companies and software platforms building financial products for US markets.
use_cases: Creating business and consumer bank accounts embedded in a SaaS platform
Issuing branded debit cards with custom rewards programs via API
Processing ACH and wire transfers programmatically for embedded finance
Building expense management or corporate card products using Solid infrastructure
Integrating bank account features into marketplace or gig economy platforms
not_for: International banking outside the US (Solid is US-only)
Consumer banking apps without a software platform wrapper
best_when: A SaaS platform or marketplace wants to embed US banking features (accounts, cards, payments) for business customers with good developer API and rewards infrastructure.
avoid_when: You need international banking, crypto features, or serve pure consumers without B2B platform context.

auth.notes: Bearer token auth. Separate sandbox and production tokens. Application-level and person-level tokens. Scoped for account management, payments, and card operations. Webhook for account and transaction events.

pricing.paid_tiers: Revenue share + platform fee; contact sales
pricing.notes: Revenue share model. Free sandbox. US-based company. Banking partner: FDIC-insured bank sponsor. Rewards infrastructure differentiator vs Unit. Card issuing with custom BIN. Corporate card and expense management support. API-first developer experience.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for persons, businesses, accounts, cards, transactions, and rewards. Bearer token with scope separation. Webhook for financial events. Good documentation. KYC/KYB required before account creation — async verification. Rewards program configuration adds complexity.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Payment operations support idempotency keys. Account creation idempotent by reference. Card operations create new cards. Transaction queries idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: KYC/KYB verification async — must poll or use webhook before account operations
Rewards program configuration must be set up before card issuance
Sandbox and production token isolation — do not mix environments
US-only — verify customer location before onboarding

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and PCI-DSS certified. US data residency. Bearer tokens with scope separation. Sandbox isolation. FDIC-insured through bank sponsor. Banking-grade security. KYC/AML compliance. Encryption at rest and in transit.
